_comment: Add these dependencies to your existing bidintell package.json. Run npm install after adding.
_notes: @anthropic-ai/sdk — official Anthropic Node SDK with web_search tool support.
googleapis — official Google Node.js client (Drive + Sheets APIs).
node-fetch is a dev fallback for older Node — Netlify Functions on Node 18+ have global fetch.
If your existing package.json already lists @anthropic-ai/sdk, ensure it's >=0.32.1 for web_search tool.
